name: Faculty
description: Teaching staff and academic positions including teachers, department heads, and academic administrators.

name: Administrative Staff
description: Administrative personnel responsible for school operations, records, and office management.

name: Support & Technical Staff
description: Support staff including maintenance, security, technical, and operational personnel.

name: Management & Leadership
description: Senior leadership and management positions including principals, directors, and board members.

name: Health & Student Services
description: Positions focused on student health, counseling, welfare, and support services.
